message:
Update Go module dependencies and gitignore patterns

This commit adds new dependencies required by enhanced features and
updates the gitignore to exclude the built binary.

## New Dependencies

### Direct Dependencies

- github.com/charmbracelet/bubbles v0.21.0
  High-level Bubble Tea components including text input, viewport,
  list, and table widgets. Used by the TUI request detail views
  for interactive input fields and scrollable content.

- github.com/fsnotify/fsnotify v1.9.0 (promoted from indirect)
  Cross-platform file system notifications. Used by the daemon's
  file watcher subsystem for config hot-reload and database change
  detection. Previously an indirect dependency of Viper, now used
  directly for more control.

### Indirect Dependencies

- github.com/atotto/clipboard v0.1.4
  Clipboard support for bubbles text input components.

- github.com/MakeNowJust/heredoc v1.0.0
  Heredoc string formatting utility.

- github.com/aymanbagabas/go-udiff v0.2.0
  Unified diff library for change visualization.

## Gitignore Updates

Added 'slb' to gitignore to exclude the built binary from the
repository root. The binary is now built to './slb' by default
during development (in addition to 'build/slb' for releases).

This prevents accidental commits of development builds while
keeping the repository clean.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
